reasoning: The chart fails to answer the primary part of the business question ('Wieviel Umsatz hatte Teckentrup...'), which asks for the total revenue per year (2021-2024). Instead, it displays monthly revenue data without aggregating by year. While the title mentions 'Umsatz ... (2021–2024)', the x-axis only shows months (Jan-Dec), making it impossible to see the annual totals directly or compare years effectively at a glance. The annotations highlight specific high/low monthly points but do not provide the yearly sums requested. A user looking for the annual performance would have to manually sum up the bars for each color group, which is error-prone and inefficient.
suggested_improvement: Change the visualization to show aggregated annual revenue. Use a bar chart where the x-axis represents the Years (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) and the y-axis represents the Total Revenue for that year. Alternatively, keep the monthly detail but add a secondary line series showing the cumulative or running total, or simply provide a separate summary table/chart for the yearly totals.
